text:
Take part in the mass poll “Will Russia go to the Olympics?”.You can vote until July 1, 2024 and you can do it once from one internet device.

There is not much time left before the start of the2024 Olympics, but the debate in the sports community is not subsiding. Some believe that Russia should participate in the Games, while others express the opposite opinion: “participation of our national team under discriminatory conditions is unacceptable.

Each sports federation in our country has its own opinion. For example, Russian rowers refused to take part in the qualifying competitions and, consequently, refused to participate in the Olympics. On the contrary, the Russian Tennis Federation (FTR) is proud of the achievements of Russian athletes and supports their participation in major international competitions.

Recall, the IOC announced the criteria for Russian and Belarusian athletes to be admitted to the Games back in December 2023. Athletes will perform under a neutral flag and will not be admitted to the parade of athletes at the opening ceremony.

In team events, athletes will not perform at all. Nor will those who support the SMO, including support staff. All paraphernalia, symbols of Russia and Belarus (anthem, flag, national colors, etc.) will not and should not be displayed at the games. Coaches and sports officials will also not be allowed to participate and only a doctor or technical staff will be able to assist the athlete.

In addition, athletes must avoid interviews during and after the Olympics on the topic of national committees, national symbols, the SMO and everything related to it. The Ukrainian Olympic Committee additionally requires that all athletes sign a waiver to participate in the2024 World Friendship Games.

In connection with the ambiguous opinion of athletes and their coaches, we want to ask you, dear readers, are you ready to see Russia at the Olympics 2024 under a neutral flag? Should we go to it at all? We think that your opinion will be able to influence the decision of those athletes who are still undecided.

Проголосовать можно 1 раз с одного интернет устройства. Допустимо выбирать до 3-х вариантов / You can vote once from one internet device. Up to 3 options can be selected.
title: Will Russia go to the Olympics?
description: Take part in the mass poll "Will Russia go to the Olympics?". You can vote until July 1, 2024 and you can do it once from one internet device.
